title: Hide a board without removing members?
excerpt:

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to hide a board, make it inaccessible temporarily, without removing the members? Like and OFF / ON button somewhere?

I just need to make some changes to the structure and don’t want members to access it while I’m doing so.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gerald! This isn’t possible at the moment so we’d suggest removing them from the board and then re-adding them.

Alternatively, if the changes you’re making are to columns or specific items, you could set up board or column permissions to prevent them from seeing or editing things they are not expressly invited to.

What do you think about this idea for a workaround?
